    x5 = equality(x4, FOUR)
    x6 = branch(x5, NEG_ONE, ONE)
    x7 = multiply(x6, THREE)
    x8 = tojvec(x7)
    x9 = vmirror(x2)

    O = fill(I, EIGHT, x10)
